userDefinedField.fieldValue: MW id 22 Both legs should be using the EOM or IMM Schedule generator to be MW compliant
MW id 22 Both legs should be using the EOM or IMM Schedule generator to be MW compliant
MW id 1 Not possible in VCON to have Mutual breaks
MW id 7 CSTM _DEAL OR mutual break status or clearing decision as Yes
Pay EUR EURIBOR 1M on floating leg Receive EUR EONIA 1M CMP on floating leg 100,000,000 Expiry 29 jun 2018
EMIR Eligible.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
